item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
Improvements

  • Automatic update checks now work reliably for menu bar apps

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
New Features

  • Auto frame color — automatically detects screenshot background and matches inner padding color for a seamless look
  • Auto-beautify now adapts frame style: light screenshots get a matching frame, dark screenshots go frameless

Improvements

  • Accurate color detection preserves the original color space (Display P3) — no more color shifts
  • Edge sampling skips shadow and antialiasing artifacts for precise color matching
  • Gradient screenshots fall back to dominant area color instead of a muddy average

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
New Features

  • Smart Crop
  • Paste from Clipboard — paste images via ⌘V or from the menu bar (supports copied files too)
  • Rounded corners for rectangles — toggle continuous rounded corners on rectangle annotations
  • Freehand resize — scale freehand drawings with selection handles
  • Redesigned gradient presets — fresh curated palette organized by mood

Improvements

  • Magnifier uses rounded rectangle shape instead of circle
  • Smoother blur/pixelate regions — no jitter during drag

Fixes

  • Editor window now reappears after cancelling screenshot capture (ESC)
  • Text annotation frame matches rendered size precisely
  • Arrow and line handles positioned exactly at endpoints

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
New Features

  • Crop tool — trim screenshots to any region, with re-crop support
  • Inline text editing — edit text annotations directly on canvas (double-click to edit)
  • Text badge style — colored background with auto-contrasting text
  • Counter pin style — pin-shaped counter badges alongside classic circles
  • Canvas styling modes — None / Auto / Manual (replaces Beautify toggle, press B to cycle)
  • Pixel color sampler — hover to see hex color of any pixel

Improvements

  • Selection handles now draggable outside canvas bounds
  • Arrow and line handles offset for easier grabbing on thick strokes
  • Ruler snaps to physical pixel boundaries (Retina-aware)
  • Magnifier resizes symmetrically from center
  • Native resolution export — pixel-perfect output without scaling artifacts
  • Faster zoom controls (0.25 step, scroll-wheel sensitivity)
  • New animated mode switcher for Screenshot/Code toggle

Fixes

  • Fixed race condition in auto-detection when switching screenshots
  • Fixed keyboard shortcuts firing during text editing
  • Fixed color hex conversion for non-sRGB colors
  • Fixed potential crash from stale annotation indices

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
• New: Magnifier tool — zoom into any area of the screenshot (1.5x–5x)
  • Improved: Smarter sensitive data detection with multi-candidate OCR matching
  • Added: Automatic updates via Sparkle
